production.playableLoop: Accelerate through the dressed rally track, steer around barriers, reach checkpoints, and recover from off-track drift.
production.objective: Drive the player car through checkpoint gates while the rival car and track dressing communicate race progress.
production.progression: Checkpoint gates, rival car placement, and track dressing provide the baseline progression path for a vehicle checkpoint slice.
production.failRetry: Use the authored reset behavior when the player leaves the road or reload the preview for a clean retry.
feedbackMoments: Car motion responds to acceleration and steering input.
Checkpoint gates provide readable objective progress.
Barriers and track edges make off-track recovery visible.

assetPlan.playerHero: Kenney-style rally car GLB from the starter kit.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Track barriers, pylons, and rival car surfaces from the starter kit.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: Checkpoint gate and finish/checker assets from the starter kit.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Reusable rally road, stand, tree, light, and barrier GLB kit pieces.
assetPlan.uiHud: Rally HUD/status source is expected when promoted from kit to generated game.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: Audio feedback is not authored in the starter baseline.

highValueSurfaces.summary: Kenney-style rally car GLB from the starter kit.
Track barriers, pylons, and rival car surfaces from the starter kit.
Checkpoint gate and finish/checker assets from the starter kit.
Reusable rally road, stand, tree, light, and barrier GLB kit pieces.
Rally HUD/status source is expected when promoted from kit to generated game.
Audio feedback is not authored in the starter baseline.

uiStates.expectation: Checkpoint progress is visible through scene and script state.

assetSourcing: Starter uses a cohesive local racing kit; preserve asset provenance when promoting the kit to a generated game.
knownBlockers: Audio feedback and full retained HUD source are intentionally outside the asset-kit starter baseline.
